name: Mos
description: Mos is a free macOS utility that makes mouse wheel scrolling smooth, with per-app settings, independent axis tuning, and button/shortcut bindings.

acceptedAnswer.text: Mos is a local macOS menu bar utility that smooths mouse wheel scrolling and supports per-app profiles, independent axis settings, and mouse button bindings.

mainEntity.name: Does Mos provide a public API or MCP server?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. Mos publishes static discovery and documentation files, but it does not provide a hosted API, OAuth service, webhook service, or public MCP tool server.
